model deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash · memory on · session new
type / for commands · ctrl-c stops a task · ctrl-q quits
hunt ./targets for security bugs and prove every one
retrieval -> z3 -> model -> prover proving each candidate by triggering it
compiled under AddressSanitizer; the PoC re-runs and ASan reports a
6-byte write past a heap allocation. Re-runnable bundle attached.
replayed on a mainnet fork; attacker balance +12.41 ETH, the vault
solvency invariant broken. The chain measured the profit, not the model.
2 findings, both reproduced. 0 unproven guesses. nothing is reported that did not run.
